# Commands

| Purpose | Command |
|---|---|
| Test | `npm test` |
| Build | `npm run build` |
| Lint | `npm run lint` |
| Typecheck | `npm run typecheck` |
| Dev | `npm run dev` |
| Deploy | `npm run deploy` |
| Debug | `not detected` |
| Migrate | `npm run migrate` |
| Seed | `npm run seed` |
| Docs | `npm run docs` |
| Audit | `npm run audit` |
| Doctor | `npm run doctor` |
